div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI'; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; background-color: #21222c; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 2rem; border: 2px solid #36384a; position: relative; overflow: hidden;

a.style: font-size: 1rem; color: red; text-decoration: none; padding: .5rem 1rem; background-color: #36384a; border-radius: .8rem; width: max-content;

img.style: position: absolute; bottom: -2rem; right: -2rem; transform: rotate(-12deg); -webkit-mask-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, right bottom, left top, from(rgba(0,0,0,1)), to(rgba(0,0,0,0)));
